title: Library and knowledge services | NICE
text:
J Best Practice 
An evidence summaries resource that provides practical knowledge to support decision-making at the point of care. It also helps with education and learning before, during and after patient consultations.
Cochrane Library 
Includes the Cochrane Database of Systematic Reviews, Central Register of Controlled Trials and Cochrane Clinical Answers.
Help and support For help and support or further information about using these resources, contact your local healthcare library. You can find details in the Health Library and Information Service Directory.
